title: EVO-STIK General Purpose PVA - White - 5L - Adhesive - Primer - Sealer and Dustproofer - For Interior Use
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: High performance, general purpose adhesive, primer, sealer and dustproofer
When used as a primer, improves adhesion to porous or difficult surfaces before plastering, rendering or screeding
Designed for interior use, Bonds most building materials provided that one is porous
Can be used neat or diluted up to 5 parts to 1
Contents: 1x EVO-STIK General Purpose PVA, Adhesive, Primer, Sealer and Dustproofer, For Interior Use, Colour: White, Size: 5L
description: From the manufacturer EVO-STIK General Purpose PVA Bonds, seals and primes EVO-STIK General Purpose PVA is an adhesive, primer, sealer and dustproofer that’s suitable for interior use on most building surfaces. When used as a primer, it improves adhesion to porous or difficult surfaces prior to plastering or screeding. Suitable materials Bonds most materials provided that one of the surfaces has a degree of porosity, e.g. timber, plywood, blockboard, chipboard, fibreboard, expanded polystyrene, polyurethane foam, insulating board, brick, concrete, stone, and slate. Coverage 6-10m² per litre, depending on how thickly it is applied. Advantages at a glance High performance adhesive, primer, sealer and dustproofer Excellent primer for most building surfaces Improves adhesion and bond strength For interior use Dilution up to 5:1 Colour: White Size: 5 litres EVO-STIK General Purpose PVA EVO-STIK Waterproof PVA EVO-STIK Strong Stuff Super Adhesive EVO-STIK All Purpose Silicone Sealant EVO-STIK Adhesive Cleaner EVO-STIK The Dog's B*ll*cks Adhesive & Sealant Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 145 4.2 out of 5 stars 314 4.4 out of 5 stars 220 4.4 out of 5 stars 6,557 4.3 out of 5 stars 812 4.5 out of 5 stars 342 Price — no data — no data — no data — no data — no data — no data Description General purpose waterproof adhesive, primer, sealer and dustproofer Waterproof adhesive, primer, sealer and dustproofer High performance, low odour adhesive with a strong, instant hold High quality, flexible silicone sealant with excellent weather and sunlight resistance Fast and effective adhesive cleaner All-in-one solvent free adhesive and sealant Suitable use For interior use For interior and exterior use Perfect for a range of DIY and repair jobs around the home Can be used to seal everything from door and window frames to baths, showers, and sinks Removes solvented adhesives, grease and wax from most impervious surfaces Sticks and seals virtually anything, anywhere!
